infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to capture evidence photos and video.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs microphone access to record audio notes and video with sound.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to GPS tag evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Crime Scene Investigator to access your camera for evidence capture.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Crime Scene Investigator to access your microphone for audio notes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Crime Scene Investigator to access your location for evidence GPS tagging.
